name: Beef Stew with Bouquet Garni
recipeIngredient: 3 lbs Beef Rump Roast, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
Marinated Beef: In a deep bowl, combine 1 clove garlic, crushed peppercorns, allspice, 1 tablespoon salt, and red wine. Stir to dissolve the salt. Add beef cubes, pressing them down into the marinade to immerse as much as possible. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour. Remove beef and garlic from the marinade with a slotted spoon, reserving the marinade. Pat beef and garlic dry on paper towels.
Beef Stew: In a 6-quart non-reactive oven-safe pot, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add garlic and sear meat in batches until browned on all sides. Return all meat to the pot. Pour in reserved marinade and beef bouillon. Add bouquet garni. Bring to a boil. Boil gently for 10 minutes, then reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
Preheat oven to 350°F. Layer carrots, onions, turnips, and mushrooms on top of the meat mixture in a casserole dish. Cover and bake at 350°F for 1.5 hours until meat and vegetables are tender. Remove bouquet garni. Stir in frozen peas. Season with salt and pepper as needed. Cover and bake an additional 4-5 minutes until peas are cooked. Spoon stew and cooking juices into individual serving bowls. Sprinkle with chopped parsley.
